response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience across TypeScript/Node.js, React, and MongoDB directly matches the core stack, with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling that aligns with the role's AI agent requirement. Strong track record of end-to-end ownership, testing discipline (TDD), and architectural contributions across multiple companies.
strengths: Direct match on TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB stack with 6+ years experience
Current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work aligns with role requirement
Demonstrated full-stack breadth plus TDD/CI/CD craftsmanship
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Limited Kotlin exposure for the secondary backend stack
Heavy DLang focus in some roles may indicate stack divergence
